aiGuidance.extraction: Extract every decision made or crystallised during the conversation. Each decision gets its own Record. Link a decision to the one it replaces with supersedes, and to decisions it relies on with depends-on.
aiGuidance.purpose: A decision log extracted from a meeting transcript. It defines a document type whose records are the settled decisions a group reached.

description: A decision log assembled from the decisions extracted out of a meeting transcript. Each decision becomes its own Record; supersession and dependency relations connect them over time.
name: decision-log
